economic_notes: Pehdzeh Ki First Nation owns 100% of Pehdzeh Ki Contractors Ltd, Petanea Corporation, and Pehdzeh Ki Development Corporation. It also holds a 14% interest in Deh Cho Helicopters Regional Limited Partnership. The Nation operates a landfill and is recognized as the designated municipal authority for the Community of Wrigley, NT.
notes: Audit opinion is qualified for three reasons: (1) inability to obtain sufficient audit evidence on equity-adjusted investments in three 100%-owned subsidiaries (Pehdzeh Ki Contractors Ltd, Petanea Corporation, Pehdzeh Ki Development Corporation) whose financial statements were not available; (2) a contribution receivable of $692,000 from Government of NWT (MACA-CPI) from year ending March 31, 2013 that cannot be confirmed as outstanding; (3) landfill closure and post-closure cost liability not recorded due to uncertainty of ultimate responsibility. Accumulated surplus on Statement of Financial Position shows $5,218,887 while Statement of Operations shows $5,238,169 — minor discrepancy likely due to rounding or presentation. The nation is located in Wrigley, NT and is exempt from income tax under Section 149 of the Income Tax Act. Contributions receivable balance is very large ($8.9M) reflecting many years of uncollected government program contributions.
